orgPolicy.title: Compensation Bands Now in Workday (GSheets Deprecated)
orgPolicy.summary: The comp bands Google Sheets are no longer functional. PeopleTech built a live Workday report to replace them.
bullets: Search by Job Family to see all ranges across levels and comp zones
Bookmark: https://wd5.myworkday.com/gusto/d/inst/1422$5089/rel-task/3001$14.htmld
PeopleTech working on deeper Workday <> Greenhouse integration — more to come

tp.point: Stop using the GSheets comp bands — switch to the Workday report now and bookmark it.

orgPolicy.title: Variable Cash Award (VCA) Field Now Live in Greenhouse Offers
orgPolicy.summary: Greenhouse offer details now include a Variable Cash Award field. Three options: No (Hourly/Not Eligible), Yes – US, Yes – Canada.
bullets: 50% individual / 50% company performance split
Always double-check offer details before sending letters

tp.point: Check every pending offer for the new VCA field — incorrect details will create offer letter errors.

orgPolicy.title: HC Submission Scorecard: Updated Job History & Tenure Prompt
orgPolicy.summary: Updated HC scorecard and Recruiter Screen scorecard are live to give clearer guidance on candidates with multiple short stints.
bullets: New HC prompt: 'Identify roles < 2 yrs, include brief context for each, and how concerns were addressed'
New Recruiter Screen prompt adds focus on role changes for L4+ candidates with multiple short stints
Already-submitted scorecards not impacted; review pending submissions to align
Non-evergreen open jobs not updated — incorporate guidance proactively

tp.point: Review in-flight HC submissions and apply the updated job history framing.

orgPolicy.title: Process Change Requests: Flag GH System Changes Early via PHC
orgPolicy.summary: IOPE is seeing an increase in urgent last-minute system change requests. All GH config changes must be tested with PeopleTech — flag early.
bullets: Submit a PHC ticket as soon as you hear of any process changes in GH
Includes: custom fields, offer detail verbiage, any configuration change

tp.point: File a PHC ticket early for any GH system change — even if you're unsure whether it counts.

orgPolicy.title: Invite Leadership Now Facilitating HC Sessions & Follow-Ups
orgPolicy.summary: Invite Leadership has taken over HC session facilitation and follow-ups. Invite Ops still supports candidate prep.
bullets: For questions or status updates on submitted candidates, go to your Invite PE — not Ops

tp.point: Route all HC questions and candidate status updates to your PE.

orgPolicy.title: Onboarding Location Field Updated in GH Offer Details
orgPolicy.summary: PeopleTech updated the GH onboarding location field to align with Workday. Only four valid options: Remote, San Francisco, New York, Denver.
bullets: Ensure every offer uses the correct onboarding location — this feeds directly to the Onboarding team

tp.point: Double-check onboarding location on in-flight offers — incorrect values will cause Workday ingestion issues.

items.heading: Recruiter DayPlay — UAT Underway
bullets: Feature is live in staging; testing in progress with final refinements happening in parallel

items.heading: Debrief Agent — Build in Progress
bullets: Eric (OS Eng) finalizing the build; final refinements and UAT are next before launch

items.heading: IKB Migration to Notion — In Progress
bullets: Ops reviewing and migrating Invite Knowledge Base resources into Notion
IKB redesign survey closed June 5 — results informing the build

items.heading: VMA Evolution — In Progress
bullets: Ops reimagining the VMA program to improve scalability and align with Gusto's direction
R&D context: Data has only 1 active VMA interviewer — scheduling bottlenecks of 1-6 days flagged

items.heading: Amelia Joins as Invite People Partner (PE)
bullets: Nerissa Irizarry transitioned Kristin and Laura to a new PE named Amelia, who joined July 14
Nerissa remains a close partner to Invite but is no longer the direct PE

items.heading: Goose Permissions Review — Arthur Gonzalez
bullets: Arthur checking Workday Recruiter role assignments to set up Goose permissions
PEs asked to confirm recruiter lists are accurate in Workday

items.heading: Q1 Results: 370 Offers Accepted (Target: 304)
bullets: Invite exceeded Q1 OA target of 304 with 370 offers accepted
Full Q1 lookback shared at August Invite Team Meeting
